Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCTETERCEIROS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CteSts = nullvalue(&CteSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' CT-e' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido, &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido) if &CteDtaEms.IsEmpty() &CteDtaEms_To = serverdate() &CteDtaEms = &CteDtaEms - 15 EndiF EndEvent Event Refresh if &CteDtaEms.IsEmpty() or &CteDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &CteDtaEms_To = serverdate() &CteDtaEms = &CteDtaEms - 15 EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWCTeTerceirosColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWCTeTerceirosColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsSelecionar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible CteDtaSai.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible CteNum.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &auxCteRemRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &auxCteDesRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &CteIniCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &CteTerCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible CteVlrTotPreSer.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible CtePlcTra.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible CteSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount CteSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &userUpdate = !'' &sdsd.Clear() &sdsd.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer') If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando) &sdsd.AddItem(1, 'Reenviar CT-e') Endif &sdsd.AddItem(2, 'Consultar CT-e') If (not CteArqXml.IsEmpty()) &sdsd.AddItem(3, 'Exporta Xml') Endif If (&AutNiv >= 3) &sdsd.AddItem(4, 'Excluir CT-e') Endif If (CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada) &sdsd.AddItem(5, 'Evento Desacordo') Endif If (CteStsFin = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto) &sdsd.AddItem(6, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (CteStsFin = Status_AbertoFechado.Fechado) &sdsd.AddItem(7, 'Cancelar Financeiro') Endif &ImprimirDanfe = !'' If (Not CteArqXml.IsEmpty()) &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Attribute' Else &ImprimirDanfe.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &auxCteRemRaz = trim(str(CteTomCod))+' -'+SubStr(trim(CteTomRaz),1,25) &auxCteDesRaz = trim(str(CteDesCod))+' -'+SubStr(trim(CteDesRaz),1,25) &CteIniCidNom = CteIniUfe + ' - ' +trim(CteIniCidNom) &CteTerCidNom = Trim(CteTerCidNom)+' - '+CteTerUfe Do Case Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Cancelada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Denegada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Inutilizada CteSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise CteSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &auxCteRemRaz.Tooltiptext = trim(CteRemRaz) &auxCteDesRaz.Tooltiptext = trim(CteDesRaz) If CteStsFin = Status_AbertoFechado.Fechado &IsSelecionar.Enabled = 0 &IsSelecionar.TooltipText = 'Financeiro fechado. Para usar está opção, cancele a Duplicata referente a este CT-e.' Else &IsSelecionar.Enabled = 1 &IsSelecionar.TooltipText = 'Ações do Financeiro' EndIf &gridCteStsFin = CteStsFin EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWCTeTerceirosColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &sdsd.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &sdsd = 1 Do 'Do ReinviarNota' Case &sdsd = 2 Do 'Do ConsultarSefaz' Case &sdsd = 3 Do 'Do ExportXml' Case &sdsd = 4 Do 'Do Excluir' Case &sdsd = 5 Do 'Do Desacordo' Case &sdsd = 6 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiro' Case &sdsd = 7 Do 'Do CancelarFinanceiro' EndCase &sdsd = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action Excluir' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNovoCteTerceiros' wpAddCteTerceiros.Link('ADD', &WWPContext.EmpCod, &WWPContext.FilCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImportaXml' &SessionGuidAux = GUID.NewGuid() &WebSessionKey = 'wpImportarCTe' + &SessionGuidAux.ToString().Trim() &WizardDataImportar = new() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardDataImportar.ToJson()) wpImportarCTe.Link('SelecioneXML', 'SelecioneXML', true, &SessionGuidAux) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoFechaFinanceiroTodos' &AuxFilCod = 0 // Filial &IsErro = False &SdtPedidos.Clear() For Each Line In Grid If &IsSelecionar = True If &gridCteStsFin = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto Or CteStsFin.IsNull() If &AuxFilCod <> FilCod And &AuxFilCod <> 0 &IsErro = True Exit EndIf &AuxFilCod = FilCod //Filial &SdtPedidosItem = New() &SdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod //Empresa &SdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod //Filial &SdtPedidosItem.PedCod = CteCod //Código da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedDtaEms = CteDtaSai //Lançamento da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedDtaFat = &Today //Dia de Hoje &SdtPedidosItem.PedCliCod = CteDesCod //Código do Destinatário &SdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = &AuxCteDesRaz //Razão Social do Destinatário &SdtPedidosItem.PedTraRedCod = CteTomCod //Código do Tomador &SdtPedidosItem.PedTraRedCodRaz = &AuxCteRemRaz //Razão Social do Tomador &SdtPedidosItem.FrtDoc = Trim(Str(CteNum)) //Número da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedVlrLiq = CteVlrTotPreSer //Valor da CT-e &SdtPedidos.Add(&SdtPedidosItem) EndIf EndIf EndFor If &IsErro = True //Se as CT-e não forem da mesma filial emitente Msg(!"Para fechamento em grupo, selecione apenas CT-e de mesma Filial!") //Emite o Erro Else If &SdtPedidos.Count > 0 //Se tiver mais 1 ou mais CT-e marcadas &WebSession.Set('CONFFECHARFINCTE', &SdtPedidos.ToXml()) //Salva a sessão com as informações das CT-e WpConfFechaCte.Popup(FilCod) //Abre o Pop-Up de confirmação Refresh Else Msg('Nenhum CT-e selecionado!') //Emite erro se não houver nenhuma selecionada EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWCTeTerceiros.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsSelecionar", '', !'', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteDtaSai", '', !'Lançamento', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteNum", '', !'Nro', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxCteRemRaz", '', !'Transportadora', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&auxCteDesRaz", '', !'Cliente/Fornec.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CteIniCidNom", '', !'Origem', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CteTerCidNom", '', !'Destino', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteVlrTotPreSer", '', !'R$.Frete', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CtePlcTra", '', !'Tração', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CteSts", '', !'Status', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWCTeTerceirosColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz1.Visible = False &CteDesRaz1.Visible = False &CteObsGer1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz2.Visible = False &CteDesRaz2.Visible = False &CteObsGer2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CteRemRaz3.Visible = False &CteDesRaz3.Visible = False &CteObsGer3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ReinviarNota' Do Case Case CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.TERCEIROS &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' é um CT-e de TERCEIROS e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Case CteSts = Status_NFe.Digitando If CteModCod = '57' GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) EndIF wpAutorizaCte.Link('', EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &SolCod) Otherwise &Mensagem = 'CTe Nº:' +trim(str(CteNum))+ ' Filial:' +trim(str(FilCod))+ ' Encontra-se com Status de ' + CteSts.EnumerationDescription() + ' e NÃO pode ser mais retransmitida!' msg(&Mensagem) Endcase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultarSefaz' If not CteChv.Trim().IsEmpty() GravaConsultaSefazCte.Call('WWCTETERCEIROS', EmpCod, FilCod,CteCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Chave do CT-e vazia, verifique!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportXml' &CteArqXml = RetornaXmlCte.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) If &CteArqXml.IsEmpty() GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) EndIF retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+CteChv+'.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&CteArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Link = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+CteChv+'.xml' Link(&Link) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Excluir' DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.ConfirmationText = 'Tem certeza que deseja excluir o CT-e nro: '+trim(str(CteNum))+' ?' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FilCod_Selected = FilCod &CteCod_Selected = CteCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_Excluir.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Action Excluir' ExcluirCte.Call(&EmpCod_Selected,&FilCod_Selected,&CteCod_Selected) Refresh keep /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Desacordo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEventoDesacordo.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiro' If &gridCteStsFin = Status_AbertoFechado.Aberto //Se o Status do Financeiro da Nota for Aberto &SdtPedidos.Clear() &SdtPedidosItem = New() &SdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod //Empresa &SdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod //Filial &SdtPedidosItem.PedCod = CteCod //Código da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedDtaEms = CteDtaSai //Lançamento da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedDtaFat = &Today //Dia de Hoje &SdtPedidosItem.PedCliCod = CteDesCod //Código do Cliente/Fornecedor &SdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = &AuxCteDesRaz //Razão Social do Cliente/Fornecedor &SdtPedidosItem.PedTraRedCod = CteTomCod //Código do Tomador &SdtPedidosItem.PedTraRedCodRaz = &AuxCteRemRaz //Razão Social do Tomador &SdtPedidosItem.FrtDoc = Trim(Str(CteNum)) //Número da CT-e &SdtPedidosItem.PedVlrLiq = CteVlrTotPreSer //Valor da CT-e &SdtPedidos.Add(&SdtPedidosItem) &WebSession.Set('CONFFECHARFINCTE', &SdtPedidos.ToXml()) //Salva a Sessão com os dados da CT-e WpConfFechaCte.Popup(FilCod) //Abre o Pop-Up de Confirmação dos dados Refresh Else Msg('CT-e com Status Financeiro Fechado!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarFinanceiro' WpCancelaFinanceiroCTe.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) //Executa os Procedimentos para Cancelar o financeiro da CT-e e a Sua Duplicata Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTENUM" &CteNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTESTS" &CteSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEPROTER" &CteProTer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTEDTAEMS" &CteDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CteDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' &CteRemRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' &CteDesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' &CteObsGer1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTENUM", "", not &CteNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTESTS", "", not &CteSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEPROTER", "", not &CteProTer.IsEmpty(), 0, &CteProTer, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTEDTAEMS", "", not (&CteDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &CteDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CteDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &CteDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEREMRAZ' AND not &CteRemRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteRemRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEDESRAZ' AND not &CteDesRaz3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteDesRaz3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTEOBSGER' AND not &CteObsGer3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CteObsGer3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"CTE" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoInsert' &Erro = 0 If &TCon105_BloqueiaNaoResolvido = 'S' ValidaCteDigitando.call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod,&erro) EndIf If &erro = 1 Msg("Atenção! Existe CT-e não resolvido (DIGITANDO) com data anterior ao dia de Hoje, Favor Resolve-los (AUTORIZADO, CANCELADO, INUTILIZADO)") Else &WebSession.Remove('WPCTE_Data') EndIf EndEvent Event &userUpdate.Click wpAddCteTerceiros.Link('ADD', EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) EndEvent Event &ImprimirDanfe.Click &CteArqXml = RetornaXmlCte.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) If &CteArqXml.IsEmpty() If CteModCod = '57' GeraXmlCteModelo57.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) Else GeraXmlCteModelo67.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, 'N', &Context.PesCod,&SolCod) EndIf EndIF // LeituraXmlDacte.Call(CteArqXml,&sdtxmlCte) // &XmlWriter.Open('novoTeste.xml') // &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&sdtXmlcte.ToXml()) // &XmlWriter.Close() GeraPdfDacte_web.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod, &UrlPDF, &UrlFisico) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = link(&UrlPDF)// RELJAS085.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod,'DACTE') RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent //Sub 'Do ExportaXml' // // &CteAveArq = RetornaXmlCteAverbacao.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) // If not &CteAveArq.IsEmpty() // retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) // &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+'Averbacao_'+CteChv+'.xml' // &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) // &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&CteAveArq) // &XmlWriter.Close() // &Link = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+'Averbacao_'+CteChv+'.xml' // Link(&Link) // Else // msg('Arquivo xml da averbação não encotrado!') // EndIF // //EndSub // //Sub 'validaUsuario' // // &IsValido = False // For each Order EmpCod,FilCod // Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where FilCod = &FilCod // // &SdtAtm.codigoatm = FilAtmCod // &SdtAtm.senha = FilAtmSen // &SdtAtm.usuario = FilAtmUsu // // &FilAtmCod = FilAtmCod // &FilAtmUsu = FilAtmUsu // &FilAtmSen = FilAtmSen // exit // EndFor // If not &FilAtmCod.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmUsu.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmSen.Trim().IsEmpty() // &IsValido = True // EndIf //EndSub //Event &EnviarEmail.Click // // If not CteSts in (Status_NFe.Digitando, Status_NFe.Inutilizada) and CteProTer = Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA // wpEnviaCte.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CteCod) // Else // msg('Só é possível o envio de CT-e Próprios, AUTORIZADOS, CANCELADOS, DENEGADOS') // EndIF // //EndEvent
